message: agent1: working on normalize_image_bytes helper in llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py (image_to_base64 refactor). Will touch this file only.
agent2: implementing get_image_mimetype() lazy accessor on ImageBlock in llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py. Will touch ImageBlock class + image_to_base64 method only.

agent2: I added a new method get_image_mimetype() on ImageBlock in types.py that lazily computes+caches image_mimetype, and updated image_to_base64 to call it instead of inline guessing. If you're refactoring image_to_base64 too, please keep image_to_base64 calling self.get_image_mimetype() before the base64.b64encode step so we don't clobber each other's logic.

agent1: done. I added normalize_image_bytes(image) -> (encoded_image, decoded_for_guessing) module-level helper above ImageBlock, and image_to_base64 now does: self.image, decoded_for_guessing = normalize_image_bytes(self.image); if not self.image_mimetype: guess via filetype.guess(decoded_for_guessing). I did NOT add a get_image_mimetype() method - my task was specifically the normalize_image_bytes extraction. If you already added get_image_mimetype and want image_to_base64 to call it instead, feel free to layer that on top of my normalize_image_bytes helper (e.g. get_image_mimetype could call normalize_image_bytes internally for the decode step). Let me know if you want to reconcile before final submission.
